title: T2 Producer/BA: Feed layer into the briefing — engine tickets + needs-decision + Linear into NEEDS-YOU/IN-FLIGHT
prompt: Fold the factory's live ticket state into the morning briefing (feed layer, step 3 of docs/morning-briefing-vision.md's dependency chain). Today ~/dev/ad/apps/project-digest computes NEEDS-YOU only from backlog markers + tickets.json and IN-FLIGHT only from backlog files + tickets.json — the engine store and Linear are invisible to it. Ship: (a) unanswered engine/store/needs-decision/*.json files (no matching decisions/ twin) as top-ranked NEEDS-YOU candidates via a new lib/engine_feed.py; (b) engine queue/ + running/ counts+titles as an 'engine' sub-dict of in_flight; (c) a stdlib lib/linear_source.py that feeds David's assigned Linear issues into both fields when a LINEAR_API_KEY exists and degrades to configured:false when it doesn't (no key exists on this machine as of authoring — expected route: build degraded and park the key-provisioning question in engine/store/needs-decision/wg-t2-05-linear-key.json, which the new feed then surfaces itself). All three digest formats plus the HTML twin render the new data additively; no existing key changes; digest code stays LLM-free and read-only over the engine store. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T2-05-briefing-feed-layer.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: python3 ~/dev/ad/apps/project-digest/digest.py dark-factory --format json --no-write yields in_flight.engine.configured == true with queue_count/running_count exactly matching ls counts of engine/store/queue/*.json and running/*.json, an in_flight.linear sub-dict, and all baseline top-level keys intact; --format md and --format box both render an engine line and view/dark-factory.html contains 'running in engine'. A DUMMY needs-decision file surfaced as the top NEEDS-YOU item during the run and zero DUMMY files remain. Fork-dependent: with no Linear key, in_flight.linear.configured == false and engine/store/needs-decision/wg-t2-05-linear-key.json exists and is itself the top NEEDS-YOU item; with a key, linear.configured == true with error null and no park file. Negative: lib/shipped.py and all engine/*.py untouched; no real engine-store files modified or deleted; python3 engine/status.py still runs clean. Both repos committed and pushed (project-digest: feed modules + wiring + renderers + README; dark-factory: one-line morning-briefing-vision.md annotation + the park file when on that route).
